title: bryophyllum × houghtonii
intro: Bryophyllum × houghtonii, also known as Kalanchoe × houghtonii, is a hybrid succulent plant belonging to the Crassulaceae family, derived from the cross between Bryophyllum pinnatum and Bryophyllum fedtschenkoi. The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Bryophyllum × houghtonii include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and wounds, as well as its ability to aid in the healing of burns and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often crushed and used to make infusions or poultices, which are applied topically to affected areas or consumed as a treatment for internal health issues.
